title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dunzo International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Dunzo International Enterprises:
Dunzo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo International Enterprises!
